text: Investigation 2026-07-02: NOT REPRODUCIBLE as filed. AMATRIX_MLX_PROBE_GPU=0 AMATRIX_OPENCL_PROBE_GPU=0 with adgeMatrix(mode='fast') + amatrix_backend_plan(op=...) exits 0 via both Rscript file.R and Rscript -e (note: backend_plan with no op just errors 'op missing'). The described path does no compute and never loads libafopencl, so it cannot produce the cl::Error clGetDeviceIDs signature. Likely misattributed: the real crashing script probably ran a spectral/compute op with AMATRIX_ARRAYFIRE_PROBE_GPU leaked into env — same root cause as amatrix-eab (uncaught cl::Error from ArrayFire OpenCL backend crossing the C bridge, arrayfire_bridge.c:305). Also environment changed: arrayfire .so rebuilt 2026-07-01 20:55, AF now CPU-pinned. Suggest: fix eab's bridge firewall + probe containment, then retest the original walkthrough script; if clean, close as duplicate of eab.
